text:
Once upon a time, there was a young girl named Ada who lived in a small village beside a magical lake that shimmered like crystal-clear glass under the sunlight. Every day, she would go to the lake to bathe, picking her berries along the way. That particular afternoon, Ada noticed something very peculiar. The lake wasn't normal this time. Its edges shimmered with an iridescent glow. She stepped closer, feeling curious.

To her amazement, a magnificent unicorn appeared out of the shimmering waves. Its mane glowed softly, casting a soft light onto Ada. She stared in awe. The unicorn approached her cautiously, its eyes filled with gentle curiosity.

"Ahh," Ada breathed out softly. "How lovely you are!"

The unicorn neighed softly, gently nibbling on a mint leaf. It seemed to enjoy Ada's company. Ada approached the unicorns' favorite pond. The fish there seemed to glow even more brightly.
